title: Commodities Trading Operations Analyst
description:
• Opportunity to work in a global investment bank.
  • Be part of a high-performing team within a global financial institution.

About Our Client

The organisation is a well-established entity in the business services sector, focused on providing comprehensive support to banking and financial services operations. It operates on a significant scale, catering to a diverse range of clients and industries.

Job Description

  • Prepare and review documentation related to commodities transactions within the banking and financial services department.
  • Ensure all documents comply with industry regulations and company policies.
  • Collaborate with internal teams to streamline documentation processes.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all transaction-related documents.
  • Identify and resolve any discrepancies in documentation promptly.
  • Support the team in managing high volumes of transactional data efficiently.
  • Provide regular updates on documentation progress to relevant stakeholders.
  • Assist in audits and reviews related to commodities documentation.

The Successful Applicant

A successful Commodities Trading Operations Analyst should have:

  • Strong knowledge of banking and financial services regulations.
  • Experience in handling documentation processes within the commodities sector.
  • Excellent organisational and time management skills.
  • Attention to detail and ability to handle large volumes of data accurately.
  • Proficiency in relevant software tools and systems.
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills.

What's on Offer

  • Work with a globally respected institution in a highly visible role.
  • Exposure to complex and dynamic client operations processes.
  • A supportive and professional work environment.
  • Renewable contract position offering valuable industry experience.



If you are ready to take the next step in your career and contribute to a leading organisation in the business services sector, we encourage you to apply for the Commodities Documentation role today!

Contact
